arts.ttl: Growing belief Manchester United ‘could be the ones’ to pay €75m clause – Club ready to deal and invest money
arts.sum: Manchester United ‘could be the ones’ to pay Victor Osimhen’s €75m release clause in the January transfer window, with Napoli ready to do business. That’s according to Il Mattino, via Napoli Magazine, who say Manchester United are very much in the mix for the Nigerian striker.
